scripts.generate:api: mkdir -p generated && curl -s http://localhost:8000/api/v1/docs/schema/?format=json > generated/openapi-schema.json && npx swagger-typescript-api generate --modular --module-name-first-tag --enum-style const --templates ./codegen/api-templates --output ./generated/api --name index --path generated/openapi-schema.json && node codegen/generate-fixtures.mjs
